ucs.title: [LLM] Windshift / Bahamut VBScript spearphishing stager → HKCU Run persistence chain
ucs.description: Hunts the canonical Windshift (a.k.a. Bahamut, MITRE G0112) intrusion chain against Middle-East targets: a spearphishing attachment/link executed from Outlook/archive utilities spawns wscript.exe or cscript.exe (their preferred VBScript stager — T1059.005), which then writes a HKCU\...\Run value pointing into %APPDATA%, %ProgramData% or %PUBLIC% within minutes. The wscript→Run-key correlation is what differentiates Windshift from generic VBS noise.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as stager_time from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name IN ("outlook.exe","winrar.exe","7zfm.exe","explorer.exe","chrome.exe","msedge.exe") Processes.process_name IN ("wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe") NOT Processes.user IN ("*$","SYSTEM","LOCAL SERVICE","NETWORK SERVICE") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name Processes.process 
| `drop_dm_object_name("Processes")` 
| join type=inner dest [
    | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as persistence_time values(Registry.registry_value_data) as reg_data values(Registry.registry_path) as reg_path from datamodel=Endpoint.Registry where Registry.registry_path IN ("*\\CurrentVersion\\Run\\*","*\\CurrentVersion\\RunOnce\\*") (Registry.registry_value_data="*\\AppData\\*" OR Registry.registry_value_data="*\\ProgramData\\*" OR Registry.registry_value_data="*\\Public\\*" OR Registry.registry_value_data="*.vbs*" OR Registry.registry_value_data="*.js*" OR Registry.registry_value_data="*wscript*" OR Registry.registry_value_data="*cscript*") by Registry.dest 
    | `drop_dm_object_name("Registry")`
  ] 
| eval delay_minutes = round((persistence_time - stager_time)/60,1) 
| where delay_minutes >= 0 AND delay_minutes <= 10 
| table stager_time persistence_time delay_minutes dest user parent_process_name process_name process reg_path reg_data 
| sort - stager_time
ucs.kql:
// Windshift / Bahamut (G0112) — spearphish-spawned VBS stager + HKCU Run persistence within 10 min
let LookbackDays = 14d;
let WindowMinutes = 10;
let _mail_or_archive_parents = dynamic(["outlook.exe","winrar.exe","7zfm.exe","winzip32.exe","explorer.exe","chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe"]);
let _vb_stagers = dynamic(["wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe"]);
let StagerExec =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (_mail_or_archive_parents)
    | where FileName in~ (_vb_stagers)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"                       // skip machine accts
    | where AccountName !in~ ("system","local service","network service")
    | project StagerTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              ParentName = InitiatingProcessFileName,
              StagerName = FileName,
              StagerCmd  = ProcessCommandLine,
              StagerSHA256 = SHA256;
DeviceRegistryEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
| where ActionType == "RegistryValueSet"
| where RegistryKey has_any (@"\CurrentVersion\Run", @"\CurrentVersion\RunOnce")
| where RegistryValueData has_any (@"\AppData\", @"\ProgramData\", @"\Public\",
                                   ".vbs",".vbe",".js",".jse",".lnk",
                                   "wscript","cscript","mshta")
| where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ ("msiexec.exe","explorer.exe","setup.exe")  // legit installers
| join kind=inner StagerExec on DeviceId
| where Timestamp between (StagerTime .. StagerTime + WindowMinutes * 1m)
| project StagerTime, PersistenceTime = Timestamp,
          DelayMin = datetime_diff('minute', Timestamp, StagerTime),
          DeviceName, AccountName, ParentName, StagerName, StagerCmd, StagerSHA256,
          RegistryKey, RegistryValueName, RegistryValueData,
          PersistenceWriter = InitiatingProcessFileName
| order by StagerTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Windshift / Bahamut (G0112) — spearphish-spawned VBS stager + HKCU Run persistence within 10 min
let LookbackDays = 14d;
let WindowMinutes = 10;
let _vb_stagers = dynamic(["wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe"]);
let _mail_or_archive_parents = dynamic(["outlook.exe","winrar.exe","7zfm.exe","winzip32.exe","explorer.exe","chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe"]);
let StagerExec =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | extend ParentLeaf = tolower(tostring(split(ParentProcessName, "\\")[-1])),
             ChildLeaf  = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName,    "\\")[-1]))
    | where ParentLeaf in (_mail_or_archive_parents)
    | where ChildLeaf  in (_vb_stagers)
    | project StagerTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
              ParentName = ParentLeaf, StagerName = ChildLeaf,
              StagerCmd  = CommandLine;
ImRegistryEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| where EventType == "RegistryValueSet"
| where RegistryKey has_any (@"\CurrentVersion\Run", @"\CurrentVersion\RunOnce")
| where RegistryValueData has_any (@"\AppData\", @"\ProgramData\", @"\Public\",
                                   ".vbs",".vbe",".js",".jse",".lnk",
                                   "wscript","cscript","mshta")
| where ActingProcessName !in~ ("msiexec.exe","explorer.exe","setup.exe")
| join kind=inner StagerExec on $left.DvcHostname == $right.Computer
| where TimeGenerated between (StagerTime .. StagerTime + WindowMinutes * 1m)
| project StagerTime, PersistenceTime = TimeGenerated,
          DelayMin = datetime_diff('minute', TimeGenerated, StagerTime),
          Computer, Account, ParentName, StagerName, StagerCmd,
          RegistryKey, RegistryValue, RegistryValueData,
          PersistenceWriter = ActingProcessName
| order by StagerTime desc
ucs.rationale: Windshift/Bahamut's published intrusion chains (SANS 2018, Objective-See WindTail 2018-2019, Talos Bahamut 2022) consistently show: (1) Middle-East-targeted spearphish (T1566.001/.002) using VBS-bearing attachments and .lnk wrappers; (2) wscript/cscript spawned from Outlook or archive tools (T1059.005, T1204.002); (3) immediate persistence via HKCU\...\Run pointing at user-writable directories (T1

ucs.title: [LLM] Windshift post-exploit reconnaissance — VBS-spawned WMI/native security-product enumeration
ucs.description: Hunts Windshift/Bahamut's distinctive on-target triage step: after the VBS stager lands, the actor's implant uses wmic.exe / tasklist / native binaries to enumerate AV products, running processes and OS info (T1518.001, T1057, T1082, T1047) before deciding to drop the second-stage. Catches the recon burst spawned from a script interpreter that itself was launched from a mail/archive parent — a chain unique to user-execution-driven actors like G0112.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=t count values(Processes.process) as recon_cmds dc(Processes.process_name) as distinct_recon_bins from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name IN ("wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe") (Processes.process_name IN ("wmic.exe","tasklist.exe","systeminfo.exe","net.exe","netstat.exe","reg.exe","whoami.exe") OR (Processes.process_name="powershell.exe" AND (Processes.process="*Win32_Product*" OR Processes.process="*AntiVirusProduct*" OR Processes.process="*Get-Process*"))) NOT Processes.user IN ("*$","SYSTEM") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name _time span=10m 
| `drop_dm_object_name("Processes")` 
| where distinct_recon_bins >= 3 
| sort - _time
ucs.kql:
// Windshift / Bahamut (G0112) — VBS-stager-driven host triage burst (>=3 distinct recon bins in 10 min)
let Lookback = 14d;
let RunBin = 10m;
let _recon_bins = dynamic(["wmic.exe","tasklist.exe","systeminfo.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","netstat.exe","reg.exe","whoami.exe","hostname.exe","ipconfig.exe","nltest.exe"]);
let _av_keywords = dynamic(["AntiVirusProduct","AntiSpywareProduct","FirewallProduct","securitycenter2","Win32_Product","Get-MpComputerStatus","Get-MpPreference"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe")
| where FileName in~ (_recon_bins)
   or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
       and ProcessCommandLine has_any (_av_keywords))
   or (FileName =~ "wmic.exe"
       and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("antivirus","antispyware","firewallproduct",
                                       "process list","os get","computersystem",
                                       "product get"))
| summarize ReconCount       = count(),
            DistinctReconBins = dcount(FileName),
            ReconBins         = make_set(FileName, 25),
            SampleCmds        = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 25),
            FirstSeen         = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen          = max(Timestamp)
            by DeviceName, AccountName, InitiatingProcessFileName,
               InitiatingProcessCommandLine, bin(Timestamp, RunBin)
| where DistinctReconBins >= 3                               // burst behaviour, not single tool
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Windshift / Bahamut (G0112) — VBS-stager-driven host triage burst
let Lookback = 14d;
let RunBin = 10m;
let _recon_bins = dynamic(["wmic.exe","tasklist.exe","systeminfo.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","netstat.exe","reg.exe","whoami.exe","hostname.exe","ipconfig.exe","nltest.exe"]);
let _av_keywords = dynamic(["AntiVirusProduct","AntiSpywareProduct","FirewallProduct","securitycenter2","Win32_Product","Get-MpComputerStatus","Get-MpPreference"]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| extend ParentLeaf = tolower(tostring(split(ParentProcessName, "\\")[-1])),
         ChildLeaf  = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName,    "\\")[-1]))
| where ParentLeaf in~ ("wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe")
| where ChildLeaf in~ (_recon_bins)
   or (ChildLeaf in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
       and CommandLine has_any (_av_keywords))
   or (ChildLeaf =~ "wmic.exe"
       and CommandLine has_any ("antivirus","antispyware","firewallproduct",
                                "process list","os get","computersystem",
                                "product get"))
| summarize ReconCount       = count(),
            DistinctReconBins = dcount(ChildLeaf),
            ReconBins         = make_set(ChildLeaf, 25),
            SampleCmds        = make_set(CommandLine, 25),
            FirstSeen         = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen          = max(TimeGenerated)
            by Computer, Account, ParentLeaf, bin(TimeGenerated, RunBin)
| where DistinctReconBins >= 3
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.rationale: Windshift implants (WindShift Win backdoor, Bahamut Windows variants documented by Cisco Talos and SANS) profile the host before second-stage delivery — calling out specifically to WMI for AV/firewall product enumeration (T1518.001) and process listings (T1057). Generic recon binaries on their own are noise, but a *burst* of ≥3 distinct recon binaries inside 10 minutes spawned directly by wscript/
